pr.title: Phase 7: CRM BC + Ticket BC + Knowledge Base + Agent Scripts (DDD/TDD)
pr.body: ## Summary Phase 7 implementation: 3 new bounded contexts following DDD + Clean Architecture + TDD. **CRM BC** (13 TDD tests): - `Customer` entity with multi-phone support (`customer_phones` relation table) - Phone validation: exactly 1 primary, valid types (mobile/landline/backup) - `CustomerInteraction` — tracks all interactions (call/ticket/im) per customer - `CustomFieldDefinition` — extensible custom fields for customer/ticket entities - Batch import with partial failure handling - Phone-based customer lookup (any phone number matches) **Ticket BC** (12 TDD tests): - `TicketCategory` — hierarchical categories with parent_id - `TicketTemplate` — lifecycle: draft → published → offline, with JSON flow graph validation - `Ticket` — state machine: open → in_progress → pending → resolved → closed (invalid transitions rejected) - Assignment, comments, resolved timestamp auto-set **AI BC** (7 TDD tests): - `KnowledgeCategory` + `KnowledgeArticle` — CRUD + full-text search (published only) - `AgentScript` — JSON content validation, active/inactive toggle - `SessionInfoTemplate` — configurable session info fields **Application Layer:** - Enhanced `ScreenPop`: now matches customer by caller phone + returns interaction history - Customer batch import/export **Infrastructure:** 12 new MySQL repos, 40+ new API endpoints **Bug fixes from PR #8 Devin Review:** - Campaign Update handler now persists changes (`svc.Update()`) - `PreviewAccept` uses `GetCaseByID(caseID)` instead of hardcoded `0` - `TrunkHealthService`: added `sync.RWMutex` for concurrent map access **Bug fixes from PR #9 Devin Review:** - Added JSON struct tags to all domain input structs (`PhoneInput`, `CreateCustomerInput`, `CreateTicketInput`, `CreateTemplateInput`, `CreateArticleInput`, `CreateScriptInput`) - `GetHealthStatus` now returns a copy of `TrunkHealthStatus` to prevent race on shared pointer 33 files changed, +3492 lines. 154 total tests, all passing with `-race`. CI green. ## Review & Testing Checklist for Human - [ ] **Ticket state machine transitions** — verify `open→closed` is correctly rejected, `in_progress→resolved` sets `resolved_at` timestamp - [ ] **CRM multi-phone validation** — test that creating a customer with 0 or 2+ primary phones returns error - [ ] **Knowledge search** — verify draft articles are excluded from search results, published articles match by title/content/tags - [ ] **TrunkHealthService mutex + copy** — confirm no race conditions under concurrent access (run `go test -race ./internal/domain/telephony/...`) - [ ] **Campaign Update handler** — test that PUT `/campaigns/{id}` actually persists name changes to DB Recommended test plan: 1. `go test -race -count=1 ./...` — all 154 tests should pass 2. Review the 3 bug fixes against the original PR #8 Devin Review comments 3. Spot-check ticket state machine edge cases in `service_test.go` ### Notes - CRM `FindByPhone` has a mock fallback path for unit tests (scans phone repo) and a MySQL JOIN path for production - Ticket template `FlowGraph` field stores JSON DAG but validation is limited to `json.Valid()` — full DAG validation can be added in a future phase Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/35e328fa681447e98fa82466c8f69b99 Requested by: @divord97 ---
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
